## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Understory and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, blog development, and AI-driven analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/Lvs7ndaVVHEUSBGbBhScEY-kNHAXvUTU?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog migration to Sanity/Vercel/Next.js planned for Friday; go-live target Monday](https://fathom.video/share/Lvs7ndaVVHEUSBGbBhScEY-kNHAXvUTU?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Content production scaling to 5 articles/week next week; focus on refining tone](https://fathom.video/share/Lvs7ndaVVHEUSBGbBhScEY-kNHAXvUTU?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Scrunch AI analytics tracking \~190 prompts; team to add more competitors/prompts](https://fathom.video/share/Lvs7ndaVVHEUSBGbBhScEY-kNHAXvUTU?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Website migration will address security issues and improve editing experience](https://fathom.video/share/Lvs7ndaVVHEUSBGbBhScEY-kNHAXvUTU?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
